task_goal: Move the file sunset.jpg from Alarms within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area to the Pictures within the same sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area in the Android filesystem.
task_goal_rewrite: The file sunset.jpg resides in the Pictures folder and is no longer present in the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area of the Android filesystem.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is present in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing sunset.jpg listed in the Pictures folder of the specified storage area; or file system view confirming the file's location in Pictures.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is no longer present in the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing the Alarms folder of the specified storage area does not contain sunset.jpg; or file system view confirming the file is absent from Alarms.

success_rule: Both required checkpoints must be satisfied to confirm the file has been successfully moved from the Alarms folder to the Pictures folder in the specified storage area.
